Petition By Julia Chan, Executor, To Establish Estates Ownership Of Property; For Appointment As Interim President Of Corporation; And To Direct Transfer Of Property To Estate, Points And Authorities. (Probate Code 850 (A)(2)(D))
Off Calendar Aug-31-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: John Braun, for and with petitioner Julia Chan; Mark Martine; Christina Ciu; Andrew Ciu.

The Court inquired if counsel had learned anything further from the New Jersey Department of Corporations. Mr. Braun responded in the negative. The Court stated that he was prepared to find that the decedent Laurence Liu was the sole shareholder of the corporation and that the corporation was thus an asset of the estate, but that he would not appooint any officers or directors. The Court granted the petition in part (subject to receipt and review of the order).

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy Grimaldi. (Not reported)

Petition By Julia Chan, Executor, To Establish Estates Ownership Of Property; For Appointment As Interim President Of Corporation; And To Direct Transfer Of Property To Estate, Points And Authorities. (Probate Code 850 (A)(2)(D))
Off Calendar Aug-02-2016 Continued To Aug-30-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: John R. Braun for petitioner; Christina Ciu.

The Court inquired regarding the petitioner's success in locating documents regarding the corporation's officers and directors. Mr. Braun stated that his client had been in communication with the Secretary of State's office in New Jersey, the state of incorporation, and had been advised that there were no additional records available. The Court stated his belief that there should be some record reflecting the identities of the corporation's officers and directors. Mr. Braun stated willingness to hire a private detective in New Jersey to pursue the inquiry further, and asked that the hearing be continued for that purpose. The matter was continued to August 30, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy Rosado. (Not reported)
